articles.title: US tightens advanced-chip export controls toward Asia
articles.summary: New rules expand restrictions on AI-grade semiconductors, prompting reroute of supply chains and renewed Gulf interest in domestic capacity.

articles.title: EU green hydrogen partnership with North Africa advances
articles.summary: Brussels signals scale-up of cross-Mediterranean hydrogen corridor; Morocco positioned as anchor exporter.

articles.title: Red Sea shipping reroutes drive Gulf logistics demand
articles.summary: Carriers extend Cape-of-Good-Hope detours; Jebel Ali and KAEC see throughput gains and rate spikes.

articles.title: PIF announces fresh anchor commitment to AI compute fund
articles.summary: Riyadh deepens stake in domestic AI infrastructure, with potential co-investments alongside MGX.

articles.title: Atlantic gas discoveries off Mauritania-Senegal coast
articles.summary: Field development progresses; downstream financing windows open for North African logistics partners.

clusters.label: AI-Compute Sovereignty Bloc
clusters.narrative: US chip controls + PIF AI commitments compound: capital flows into Gulf-domiciled compute as Asia routes diversify.

clusters.label: Atlantic-Med Energy Corridor
clusters.narrative: EU hydrogen pull + Atlantic gas finds reposition Morocco as the European energy gateway westward.

clusters.label: Red Sea Logistics Premium
clusters.narrative: Persistent Bab-el-Mandeb risk locks in elevated Gulf transshipment volumes through 2026.

MA.title: Lock multi-year EU hydrogen offtake
MA.body: Use the Brussels signaling window to convert MOUs into binding offtakes with Spanish and German anchor buyers — Morocco's grid-link to Iberia is the moat. Pair with phosphate-DAP financing tied to the same instruments to compound African food-security narrative.

MA.title: Activate Atlantic Initiative downstream
MA.body: Position Tan-Tan / Dakhla as midstream nodes for Mauritania-Senegal gas; pre-build storage and regas optionality before majors finalize FIDs.

SA.title: Move first on AI-compute domestication
SA.body: Translate PIF anchor into a sovereign GPU reserve. The chip-control window favors jurisdictions with capital + grid. Stand up KAUST + NEOM compute clusters as licensed partners before Asian capacity returns.

SA.title: Hedge Red Sea premium
SA.body: Bahri rate gains are real but fragile — lock 18-month charters now, redirect surplus margin to NEOM port build-out.

AE.title: Capture chip-control arbitrage
AE.body: G42 + MGX should accelerate licensing dialogues with US Commerce. The ADGM-domiciled compute structure is the pitch — neutral, audited, rules-bound.

AE.title: Convert logistics windfall to permanent share
AE.body: Use Jebel Ali rate uplift to subsidize long-tenor shipper contracts; the goal is structural share, not cyclical profit.
